prompt.content:
Change the following metrics in the tax exposure calculation:
1.	2021 – 2023 gross margin to 34%.
2.	Fixed asset book straight line depreciation period to 6 years for all asset classes.
Calculate the net taxable income increase for the years 2021, 2022, and 2023.
Format: Dollar figures to zero decimal places.

rubrics.name: States 2021 net taxable income increase  is $12,998,200 (acceptable range... (ver_90df8ef36d7e4761a69e26243b528cd3)

messages.content: States 2021 net taxable income increase  is $12,998,200 (acceptable range $12,998,201 to $12,998,199).

messages.content: States 2022 net taxable income increase  is $5,715,767 (acceptable range $5,715,766 to $5,715,768).

messages.content: States 2023 net taxable income increase is -$618,900 (acceptable range -$618,901 to -$618,899).

golden_responses.golden_text_response:

2022 net taxable income increase  is $5,715,767
